title: Graph Visualization UI Implementation Plan
summary: Implementation plan for embedding an interactive SvelteKit graph visualization UI into the specgraph binary.
notes: Structured as a step-by-step implementation/task plan with checkboxes and file-by-file breakdown, not a decision record, product requirements doc, or formal API/schema spec. Contains code snippets and technical contracts (proto message definitions) similar to a SPEC, but the dominant structure is a task execution plan referencing a separate linked design spec document. Classified as DOC (supporting/planning context) since it documents 'how to implement' rather than declaring a locked decision or user-facing requirement.
